title: Matilda the Musical
full_description: Roald Dahl's Matilda, adapted by Dennis Kelly with music and lyrics by Tim Minchin, tells the story of a precociously gifted little girl who, armed with a vivid imagination and iron will, dares to take a stand and change her own destiny. The Royal Shakespeare Company production won seven Olivier Awards including Best Musical, and transferred to West End and Broadway. 'A joyous, explosive, richly imagined piece of theatre.' (The Guardian)
ai_summary: Tim Minchin and Dennis Kelly's RSC adaptation of Roald Dahl — seven Olivier Awards, a perfect marriage of dark wit and musical invention, with Matilda herself as one of the great anti-heroes of musical theatre.
